entries.title: Third-round audit hardened the publication gate
entries.summary: A Codex cross-audit separated deterministic JSON preflight from genuine external fact checking and tightened LIVE freshness and source-diversity rules.
changes: Recomputed freshness from data_as_of instead of trusting a producer-supplied FRESH label.
Required two independent source domains for LIVE workspace records.
Marked deterministic candidate checks as preflight rather than independent market-data verification.
Designed separate release lanes for safe system updates and research evidence ledgers.
evidence: Website unit tests and verify-all quality gate
